rulings.Case Title: QUINTEN JOSEPH FRY, BY THEO HONNIBALL, POWER OF VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al

DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTMES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to April 26, 2013. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C and provide courtesy copy operative complaint with cover letter noting new hearing date no later than April 13, 2013. = (501/REQ)
